videos.headline: Donovan Smith rumbles into the end zone for a Houston TD
videos.description: Donovan Smith scores a 1-yard rushing touchdown to give Houston a 7-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Donovan Smith rumbles into the end zone for a Houston TD) 2024/11/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Giddens barrels into the end zone for a Kansas State TD

videos.headline: Avery Johnson connects with Keagan Johnson for a Kansas State TD
videos.description: Avery Johnson hits Keagan Johnson in the end zone to score a touchdown before the half.
